data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed commit 32bc14ed41391936403389f909e2dbdbc9fb3226 on branch codex/8c78-overview-tabs. Diff is scoped to overview state classification, tab UI, tests, and column width. The implementation matches the requested taxonomy: Work Items excludes ready_for_exploration, ready_to_evaluate, abandoned, deferred, and shipped; Exploration/Gates/Terminated own their requested states; Terminated includes shipped again. Tests cover filtering, tab counts, state routing, required empty special-tab columns, labels, and lease metadata. Full gates and browser checks passed; no invariants, regressions, or security concerns found.
